column1: # L1 Core already has 16 rows in actions_READY.tsv and the L20 capstone (The Body Complete) exists.
# This staging file fills: 2x L2 level-up, 12x L3 subclass (4 per path), 2x L5 power, 6x L9 subclass power.

column3: When you mend an ally, the thread pulls through you too. The first heal you cast each turn also restores 3 + SIGNAL HP to you.
Lay a palm on any creature you can see. Learn its three lowest stats and whether its wounds are flesh, frame, or soul. Its next defense against you drops by 2.
Close a wound the body has already given up on. Remove one permanent injury, severed limb effect, or death-wound on an ally for the rest of the scene; they take 6 irrevocable HP from you to do it.
Press your hand to an ally's sternum and give them one of your heartbeats. They gain Regen 4 and cannot drop below 1 HP until your next turn; you cannot regain HP this round.
Kneel in the blood and work fast. Restore 5 + SIGNAL HP to every bleeding or critical ally within 15 feet and clear one Bleed from each.
Mark an ally with a sigil of your own blood. The next time they would die this scene, they instead collapse to 1 HP with Regen 3 and the sigil burns away.
Whisper to a wound and tell it what to become. Target bleeding creature within 20 feet: deal 6 + SIGNAL damage and add Bleed 2; each Bleed stack now also reduces its IRON by 1.
The target's own body turns on it. Organic enemy within 10 feet: Stagger and deal 4 + SIGNAL damage; the next attack that enemy makes also hits itself for half damage.
Plant a bloom of necrosis in a 10-foot zone. Creatures entering or starting their turn in it take 3 + SIGNAL damage and gain Bleed 1. Lasts 2 rounds.
You shape a visible, impossible wound on a target and let them watch it form. Apply Expose 4 and Fear; enemies adjacent to the target must spend 1 extra AP to target it this round (or flee).
Pull a spur of living bone from your forearm. For this scene, your basic attack deals +IRON damage and has reach 10 feet. You lose 4 HP when you draw it.
Grow a limb, a gill, a wing — whatever the moment demands. Until end of next turn, gain one: climb speed, swim speed, 10-foot leap, or darkvision. You may also ignore one difficult-terrain penalty.
Shuck your current body like old clothes. Remove all debuffs and one wound on yourself; the discarded husk remains as difficult terrain in your space for 1 round.
Harden your core into plated shell. Gain Guard 6 + SIGNAL and resistance to Bleed until start of your next turn; while active, you cannot be healed by others.

column1: # ---------- L5 Power (2 new; Flesh Surge already exists) ----------

column3: Reshape the battlefield through open wounds. Every bleeding creature within 30 feet: allies clear all Bleed and gain 10 + SIGNAL HP; enemies take 10 + SIGNAL damage and add Bleed 3.
Cut your palm and press it to an ally's. For 3 rounds, half of any damage they take is dealt to you instead, and any HP either of you restores is split evenly between you both.
A fallen ally within 60 feet who died this scene sits up, whole. They return at half HP with Regen 5, but they owe a scar to you that the GM may call on once later.
Grow a ring of ghost-hands around you, each one a mender. For 3 rounds, each ally within 20 feet automatically gains 4 + SIGNAL HP and clears 1 Bleed at the start of their turn.
Organic enemy within 30 feet unravels. Deal 20 + IRON damage; apply Bleed 5, Expose 5, and Stagger; on kill, the corpse detonates for half that damage in a 10-foot radius.

Carve a disease into being and hand it to your enemies. Choose 3 enemies within 40 feet: each gains Bleed 2 and a custom debuff you name (GM approves); every time one of them acts, the debuff spreads to an adjacent enemy. Lasts 3 rounds.

column1: # ---------- L9 Subclass Power: The Self Shaper (2) ----------

column3: Become the shape the fight demands. For 3 rounds, choose one each round: +IRON damage and reach (predator), +SIGNAL and flight (hawk), Guard 10 and Regen 4 (tortoise). Cannot be healed by others while transformed.
Split your body into three lesser copies. Each acts on your turn with 1 AP, shares your HP pool, and can be anywhere within 40 feet. Lasts until one dies or you spend 1 AP to recombine.
